task_completion.description: Verify that Screaming Frog SEO Spider has crawled the target website 'books.toscrape.com'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog UI showing 'books.toscrape.com' in the URL bar at the top, with crawl progress or completed crawl results visible in the main window.

task_completion.description: Verify the H2 data has been exported as a CSV file to the specified exports folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing an H2-related CSV file in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a Screaming Frog save dialog confirming this exact path for the H2 export.

task_completion.description: Verify the internal HTML data has been exported as a CSV file to the specified exports folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window showing an internal HTML-related CSV file in '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a Screaming Frog save dialog confirming this exact path for the Internal HTML export.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the text report file at the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open with the file 'h2_structure_report.txt' or a file manager showing this file located in '~/Documents/SEO/reports/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes the total number of pages crawled and the count of pages missing H2 headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'h2_structure_report.txt' explicitly states the total pages crawled (should be around 20) and the specific number of pages missing H2s.

task_completion.description: Verify the report includes observations about duplicate/long H2s and specific recommendations for the content team.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text inside 'h2_structure_report.txt' contains sentences or sections discussing duplicate or long H2s, along with actionable advice or recommendations directed at the content team.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl and exports.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application interface with populated crawl data, rather than just terminal commands, python scripts, or mock files.

integrity.description: Verify the report was written based on actual crawl data rather than hallucinated or hardcoded text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the report (e.g., total pages crawled) should roughly match the data visible in the Screaming Frog UI or the expected ~20 pages for the target site.

integrity.description: Verify the CSV files were exported from the application and not generated via terminal commands bypassing the SEO tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts (like echo or python) to generate CSVs with mock data; presence of Screaming Frog export dialogs or native application artifacts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL is 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. The website has approximately 20 pages total, so the CSVs and report should reflect around 20 pages crawled. Screaming Frog's H2 tab exports columns with hyphens, such as 'H2-Length-1', not spaces.
